text_uthmani: لِيُكَفِّرَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ أَسْوَأَ ٱلَّذِى عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِيَهُمْ أَجْرَهُم بِأَحْسَنِ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
translation_en: And to this end, God will efface from their record the worst that they ever did, and give them their reward in accordance with the best that they were doing [in life].
